Notice Of Hearing And Request For Default Proveup; Summary Iso Prove Ip
Off Calendar Apr-03-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Sam Wu, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Wu's Construction, Inc.

Plaintiff's Witness Jia Chao Wu, was placed under oath and direct examined.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Stanley Leong as follows:

Damages/Principal - $87,500.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $33,500.00
Attorney's Fees - none
Costs - $1,296.95 for a total judgment in the amount of $122,296.95

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
